review_reason: CRITICAL: Task 967 goal is mathematically impossible. Research-006.md (task 964) proves canonicalR_irreflexive requires T-axiom, which is not in TM logic. Fresh atoms enable Steps 2-5 but NOT Step 6 (the T-axiom gap). The plan's claim 'proof strategy is sound' contradicts team research findings. Task description needs revision.

partial_progress.details: Phase 1 partially completed (String -> Atom type fixes). Analysis reveals the task goal is mathematically impossible: research-006.md (task 964) proves with HIGH CONFIDENCE that canonicalR_irreflexive cannot be proven in TM logic without T-axiom. Fresh atoms (Atom.exists_fresh) resolve Steps 2-5 of the Gabbay IRR proof but NOT Step 6, which requires H(phi)->phi (T-axiom). This axiom is not in TM logic. The one-world reflexive model satisfying all TM axioms proves this is a genuine impossibility, not a proof engineering issue.

errors.message: canonicalR_irreflexive is NOT a TM theorem. Research-006.md (task 964) proves this with a semantic impossibility argument: a one-world reflexive model satisfies ALL TM axioms but has a reflexive world. Therefore not-CanonicalR(M,M) cannot be a TM theorem. The axiom documents a FRAME PROPERTY assumption, not a provable theorem.
errors.recommendation: Three options: (1) Keep axiom as documented frame property (recommended per research-006/007), (2) Switch to reflexive semantics with T-axioms (40-100 hours, per research-007), (3) Archive CanonicalIrreflexivity.lean as a failed proof attempt and keep the axiom

errors.message: Implementation plan (based on research-001.md) contradicts team research (research-006.md). Plan claims 'proof strategy is sound' but research-006 proves Step 6 requires T-axiom. The task description needs revision.
errors.recommendation: Revise task 967 to: (A) Complete type fixes (valuable for consistency), (B) Update documentation explaining why proof is impossible, (C) Keep axiom, (D) Optionally archive the incomplete proof
